data.title: Mainz Biomed Announces Reverse Stock Split Soon After Collaborating With MedTech Giant Thermo Fisher Scientific
data.description: Mainz Biomed partners with Thermo Fisher to develop advanced colorectal cancer screening tools while enhancing ColoAlert for faster, accurate results.

Fed's Kugler Sees Inflation Progress But Warns: 'Policy Is Not On A Preset Course'
